headline: Linde (LIN) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Linde (LIN) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Linde, Raises Price Target to $552
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Linde (NASDAQ:LIN) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $512 to $552.
